name: Scott Morris
title: Founder & Lead Installer, Right Choice Seamless Gutters
bio: Scott has been installing seamless gutters across Central Virginia since 2014 — first as a one-man crew with a truck and a gutter machine, now leading a full team. He's an authorized Leaf Solution dealer and personally walks every estimate at every job over $5,000. PLACEHOLDER BIO — Scott to provide his actual story, family, and any certifications.
credentials: PLACEHOLDER - add real certifications and license number when issued
